rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-2666; standardizing performance testing infrastructure, not a driver behavior fix.
Documentation rename for consistency with other drivers; no spec behavior involved, purely docs change.
Bug in PHP aggregation Builder accepting numeric field names; internal builder API, no spec rule violated.
Missing 'codec' option passthrough in listSearchIndexes Builder; internal API gap, no spec rule cited.
GridFS writable stream not closed on process end; GridFS spec requires upload stream to be finalized, file lost without explicit close.
Adding a runnable GridFS example to docs; documentation improvement, no spec behavior involved.
GridFS spec requires rename to apply to all revisions; StreamWrapper::rename() not implemented per spec.
New feature to delete GridFS files by filename via StreamWrapper; needs spec update, currently unspecified behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2761; avoid appending write/read concern in Atlas Search Index commands, spec rollout child ticket.
PHP aggregation Builder bug: $sum only accepts array, not single expression; internal Builder API issue, no cross-language spec rule.
PHP Builder API ergonomics: $exists default value; internal convenience improvement, no spec rule cited.
Adding PHP enum for date units in aggregation Builder; internal API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
createIndex() fails to pass 'comment' option correctly; index management implementation bug but no specific spec rule mandates this option handling.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2877; fixing racy unified spec tests for unacknowledged writes, test infrastructure fix.
Release signing infrastructure; build/packaging concern with no spec behavior involved.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2369; sessions spec requires disabling causal consistency in implicit sessions; driver had wrong behavior (Bug type).
Issue split from DRIVERS-2847; updating CSFLE test definitions, test infrastructure update not a driver behavior fix.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2768; Improvement type spec rollout for vectorSearch index type support.
Replacing Cursor type hints with CursorInterface for BC reasons; internal PHP API refactor, no spec behavior involved.
Removing deprecated IndexInfo::isGeoHaystack() method in 2.0; API deprecation cleanup, no spec rule violated.
Removing deprecated Find options (maxScan, modifiers, etc.) in 2.0; API deprecation cleanup, no spec rule violated.
typeMap option not inherited in listSearchIndexes; internal option propagation bug, no spec rule mandates typeMap inheritance.
Removing deprecated autoIndexId option for 2.0; API cleanup of long-deprecated option, no spec rule violation.
Adding git submodule for spec tests to auto-update via dependabot; test infrastructure improvement similar to RUBY-3634.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1447; Improvement type spec rollout for eliminating unnecessary killCursors when batchSize==limit.
Implementing named arguments for $search stage in PHP Builder; internal API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Internal refactor to use is_document() helper for hint validation; code quality improvement, no spec behavior change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3081; relaxing optional fields and adding appName for failPoints in unified transaction tests.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3071; don't mandate distanceField in $geoNear, Improvement type spec rollout.
Using git submodule for drivers-evg-tools to avoid random build breakage; CI/build infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Allowing Pipeline object in aggregate() method in v2; PHP API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule violation.
PHP Builder type acceptance bug: string not accepted where resolveTo* expected; internal Builder API issue, no spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2658; Improvement type spec rollout for index hint support in distinct command.
Allowing dependency injection into BuilderEncoder constructor; PHP-specific DI architecture improvement, no spec rule.
PHP Builder accepting DateTimeInterface for date values; convenience API ergonomics in PHP context, no spec rule.
Database::withOptions() not inheriting builderEncoder; internal PHP option propagation bug, no spec rule involved.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3007; renaming WriteConcernFailed code name per spec update, Improvement type spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2978; Bug type fixing a failing unified spec test for operationId in log messages.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3036; Improvement type spec rollout removing BSON doc size validation requirement for client bulk write.
Adding CollectionInfo::isView() helper method; PHP convenience API addition, no spec rule involved.
Env var handling bugs in test suite (CRYPT_SHARED_LIB_PATH, SKIP_CRYPT_SHARED); CI/test infrastructure bug, not spec behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3052; Improvement type spec rollout for $concatArrays and $setUnion aggregation accumulators.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3228; Improvement type spec rollout for $createObjectId aggregation operator support.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3226; Improvement type spec rollout for regex support in $replaceAll and $split.
CSFLE spec requires metadata collections (.esc/.ecoc) to be dropped when encrypted collection is dropped; driver fails to do so without encryptedFieldsMap.
Documenting BC policy in contributing guidelines; documentation task, no spec behavior involved.
Casting empty KMS provider array to BSON document for Symfony DI compatibility; PHP framework interop issue, not a spec deviation.
Broken redirect on Laravel MongoDB docs Sessions page; documentation/website issue, no spec behavior.
Adding example to with_transaction docs; documentation improvement, no spec behavior involved.
BuilderEncoder accepting iterable for custom encoders for Symfony DI; PHP framework interop convenience, no spec rule.
